## Checklist

- [ ] I read and followed `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] This pull request addresses one focused change and links its issue.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] Robot-facing behavior has the required completed real-hardware test record.
- [ ] I updated user-facing docs and tool descriptions where needed.
- [ ] I preserved dry-run, overwrite, confirmation, and network-restoration safety boundaries.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, robot Wi-Fi passwords, student information, build output, or unrelated changes.
- [ ] I included screenshots for visible website changes.
